content: TASK-025 interrupt done: abstraction now supports both subgraph and zone targets via render(model,{abstractionTarget,abstractionLevel}), RenderResult.setAbstractionTarget(...), <archmap-viewer abstraction-target>, and the playground/viewer Abstraction target selector. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work unless the human chooses to polish abstraction-node visuals or edge-merge summaries. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
